top_signals.title: Asset Purchase Facility: Gilt Sales – Market Notice 19 June 2026
top_signals.summary: This Market Notice sets out the schedule for sales in Q3 2026 of gilts held in the Asset Purchase Facility (APF) for monetary policy purposes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: ‘I’ll just die on the island’: Some in Okinawa to resist evacuation
top_signals.summary: For many older people on Okinawa's remote islands, Taiwan contingency plans do not necessarily guarantee their safety, while some are scarred by memories of World War II.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Foreign Secretary announces nearly £290 million to strengthen Ukraine's recovery and energy security
top_signals.summary: Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper announces a new support package at the Ukraine Recovery Conference in Gdańsk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Megan Greene's CV and questionnaire for the Treasury Select Committee
top_signals.summary: Published for the Treasury Select Committee
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: It’s Coming Home − speech by Shoib Khan
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Pakistan Urgently Seeks LNG as Hormuz Flare-Up Chokes Supply
top_signals.summary: Pakistan is seeking to buy liquefied natural gas for delivery this week as a string of attacks in the Strait of Hormuz disrupts flows of the super-chilled fuel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Great British Summer Savings: Tax cut on kids’ meals and days out goes live
top_signals.summary: Tax cut on meals and days out come into force.
